meta.title: The REAL TRUTH about America's RUSTY F-35s
meta.description:
Go to https://ground.news/Sandboxx to stay fully informed on military developments around the world. Subscribe through my link right now for 40% off their Vantage Plan, which is what I use everyday.

– BREAK –

Back in 2022, images from the flight deck of an American aircraft carrier clearly showed the Navy’s new stealth fighters looking very run down, with patches and streaks of brown rust clearly visible on the fuselage of multiple jets. 

This prompted a wave of hot takes and hyperbolic headlines... but was it really ever a problem?
